name: priority:P0
description: Critical priority — production broken, data loss, security breach. Managed by ForgeDock.

name: priority:P1
description: High priority — major feature broken, no workaround. Managed by ForgeDock.

name: priority:P2
description: Medium priority — impaired functionality, workaround exists. Managed by ForgeDock.

name: priority:P3
description: Low priority — minor issue or polish. Managed by ForgeDock.

name: workflow:investigating
description: Pipeline: investigation phase in progress. Managed by ForgeDock.

name: workflow:ready-to-build
description: Pipeline: investigation complete, ready for build. Managed by ForgeDock.

name: workflow:building
description: Pipeline: implementation in progress. Managed by ForgeDock.

name: workflow:in-review
description: Pipeline: PR created, under review. Managed by ForgeDock.

name: workflow:awaiting-merge
description: Pipeline: remediated + re-reviewed, awaiting a human merge decision. Managed by ForgeDock.

name: workflow:merged
description: Pipeline: PR merged, issue closed. Managed by ForgeDock.

name: workflow:decomposed
description: Pipeline: decomposed into sub-issues. Managed by ForgeDock.

name: workflow:invalid
description: Pipeline: issue closed as invalid after investigation. Managed by ForgeDock.

name: needs-human
description: Pipeline stalled — requires human intervention. Managed by ForgeDock.

name: review-finding
description: Defect or improvement found during automated PR review. Managed by ForgeDock.

name: needs-validation
description: Review finding awaiting human validation. Managed by ForgeDock.

name: validated
description: Review finding confirmed as a real issue. Managed by ForgeDock.

name: false-positive
description: Review finding dismissed as a false positive. Managed by ForgeDock.

name: staging-review
description: Finding from a staging branch review before deploy to main. Managed by ForgeDock.

name: audit-finding
description: Security or compliance defect found during audit. Managed by ForgeDock.

name: orchestration-metrics
description: Running log of persisted audit-agents efficiency summaries. Managed by ForgeDock.

name: health-report
description: Pipeline health report issue. Managed by ForgeDock.

name: bug
description: Something isn't working. Managed by ForgeDock.

name: enhancement
description: New feature or request. Managed by ForgeDock.

name: feature
description: New feature implementation. Managed by ForgeDock.

name: refactor
description: Code restructuring without behavior change. Managed by ForgeDock.

name: dead-code
description: Unused code to be removed. Managed by ForgeDock.

name: improvement
description: Non-bug improvement to existing functionality. Managed by ForgeDock.

name: documentation
description: Documentation addition or update. Managed by ForgeDock.

name: qa
description: Quality assurance or testing issue. Managed by ForgeDock.

name: security
description: Security vulnerability or hardening. Managed by ForgeDock.

name: performance
description: Performance optimization or regression. Managed by ForgeDock.
